name: The Unified Medical Dictionary (UMD) - AIMS
snippet:
The Unified Medical Dictionary (UMD) is an English/Arabic Medical Dictionary, It also includes a specialized archive.
Unified Medical Dictionary (UMD) is an English/Arabic Medical Dictionary, which was originally compiled in the late 1960s/early 1970s
